protocol.cond_replaced: FiLM conditioning tensor only; weights fixed
protocol.ci: overlapping_holdout_se, 8 random 20% holdouts (DEPRECATED, not a jackknife — taniteval/ci.py)
protocol.intent_conditioning: follow-command hierarchy (deploy-realistic, no route cmd given)

seam_nav_to_strategic._note: route target is derived from the SAME future heading as the nav command, so nav->route is load-bearing BY CONSTRUCTION (the command propagates to the route head). The genuine strategic-vision signal is whether route_acc_follow beats majority_straight_rate — if the follow head just predicts straight, it adds no vision.

seam_intent_to_operative._regime: intent conditions the intent-FiLM of the multi-horizon JEPA latent prediction (horizons 1/2/4); the grounded pose rollout is intent-free by design (eval_grounded_rollout_4b) so it is NOT the seam's regime — see diagnostic below

cond_norms._note: norms in the predictor FiLM-cond space; intent_proj(intent) >= action_emb means the intent term SWAMPS the action signal it is added to -> corrupts the operative prediction

diagnostic_intent_in_grounded_rollout_OU._note: threading intent into the 20-step recursive grounded rollout (readout calibrated intent-free) is off-manifold; the ADE blow-up shows the intent FiLM DOES strongly perturb the operative predictor, but this is not how the seam is used

follow_route_head_degenerate._note: under follow (no route command) the strategic route head collapses to constant-straight -> carries no directional signal at deploy; use the commanded head for coherence

consistency._note: route is a 15-25 s heading; maneuver/trajectory are 2 s — some cross-timescale disagreement is CORRECT, not incoherence. maneuver_vs_trajectory is the same-timescale coherence test.

verdict: hierarchy 1/3 seams load-bearing · nav->strat LOAD-BEARING by construction (route 1.0 cmd / 0.7083 follow vs 0.7083 majority; vision route NONE) · ctx->tactical decorative (vs-mean: man Δ-0.0399, wp Δ0.3977, goal-cos Δ0.003) · intent->operative HARMFUL (cos vs-none Δ-0.2464, per-window vs-mean Δ-0.0038) · coherence man~traj kappa=0.6938 (agree 0.8811) · H18 grounded BEATS ungrounded goal (0.4045 vs 3.1468 m)

thesis_read.claim: operative->tactical->strategic hierarchy with cross-layer alignment is efficient AND dominant

A_conditioning_helps_conditioned_layer.nav->strategic: command echo only — load-bearing by construction, no scene-based route inference (follow==majority)
A_conditioning_helps_conditioned_layer.ctx->tactical: decorative; best on-distribution effect goal-cos Δ0.003 (maneuver & waypoint deltas not CI-separated)
A_conditioning_helps_conditioned_layer.intent->operative: HARMFUL if engaged (real cos < intent-free); vs-none Δcos -0.2464, per-window vs-mean Δcos -0.0038; deployed operative rollout is intent-free
A_conditioning_helps_conditioned_layer.verdict: FALSIFIED — top-down conditioning does NOT measurably carry downstream performance at this checkpoint

B_layers_mutually_consistent.verdict: SUPPORTED — same-timescale tactical maneuver & operative trajectory cohere

C_grounding_dominant_H18.verdict: SUPPORTED — grounded readout beats the ungrounded head
